assertionResults.fullName: Assign / Unassign task flow assigns a technician, prevents duplicate assign, and allows unassign
assertionResults.title: assigns a technician, prevents duplicate assign, and allows unassign

assertionResults.fullName: Assign / Unassign task flow assigns and unassigns tasks when the task id is a string
assertionResults.title: assigns and unassigns tasks when the task id is a string

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/register should register a new user
assertionResults.title: should register a new user

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/register should not register user with invalid email
assertionResults.title: should not register user with invalid email

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/login should login user with correct credentials
assertionResults.title: should login user with correct credentials

assertionResults.fullName: Authentication POST /api/auth/login should not login with incorrect password
assertionResults.title: should not login with incorrect password

assertionResults.fullName: Management approval request flow auto-resolves scope_defined complaint with all tasks done when requesting resident approval
assertionResults.title: auto-resolves scope_defined complaint with all tasks done when requesting resident approval

assertionResults.fullName: Management approval request flow rejects approval request when tasks are not all done
assertionResults.title: rejects approval request when tasks are not all done

assertionResults.fullName: Technician routes GET /api/technician/tasks returns tasks assigned to the technician
assertionResults.title: returns tasks assigned to the technician

assertionResults.fullName: Technician routes GET /api/technician/tasks/:complaintId/:taskId returns the selected task detail
assertionResults.title: returns the selected task detail

assertionResults.fullName: Technician routes PATCH /api/technician/tasks/:complaintId/:taskId/status updates task status to in_progress
assertionResults.title: updates task status to in_progress

assertionResults.fullName: Technician routes PATCH /api/technician/tasks/:complaintId/:taskId/status accepts a work report and sets status to done
assertionResults.title: accepts a work report and sets status to done

assertionResults.fullName: complaintOperations.getComplaintStats returns only the calling user stats for a regular user
assertionResults.title: returns only the calling user stats for a regular user

assertionResults.fullName: complaintOperations.getComplaintStats returns overall stats for an admin user
assertionResults.title: returns overall stats for an admin user
